description: Initial screen state showing the Askable Sessions setup page with screen sharing instructions.

description: The instruction text on the screen changes to 'Perfect!'.

description: Task instructions are displayed on the screen, detailing the scenario of exploring a prototype with new filtering features during a lunch break.

description: The browser navigates from the Askable Sessions page to the Figma prototype URL.

description: The Figma prototype content loads, showing the 'Explore' page with various research opportunities.

description: The user scrolls down the 'Explore' page to browse the available research sessions.
frame_description: The list of opportunity cards scrolls vertically, revealing items further down the page.

description: The cursor hovers over the 'Diary Study' opportunity card.

description: The cursor moves to the top right area of the screen and remains stationary.
frame_description: The cursor is located in the upper right quadrant of the screen, away from the main mobile app prototype interface.

description: User types the beginning of their response: 'I noticed you mentioned it makes'

description: The 'Split view' notification banner closes and disappears.
